title: aethionema saxatile var. marginatum
intro: Aethionema saxatile var. marginatum, also known as Mountain Rocket or Rocket Cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Aethionema saxatile var. marginatum include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in reducing swelling and pain, and its antiseptic properties, which can help to prevent infection. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat digestive issues and support overall health and well-being.
